body:
Post-resync verification + a salvage pickup. State: ai_chi 419 green, floor True, mount resynced (graveyard_redaction tests 4 OK — confirming last cycle's 418/4-errors was the §12 torn-mount, NOT a regression).

VERIFIED CLOSED (your handoff graveyard_redaction_orbi_guard): O-G1 secret leak fixed (redaction in backup_indexer/reader/search; index rebuilt 0 raw secret-shape rows) + executor exclusions now cover target+args, handlers still simulated. Confirmed independently.

MY graveyard_reader.py enhancement VERIFIED working now (was §12-write-lag-blocked last cycle): E2 contains_secret_shape fail-closed + E3 atomic os.replace + E1 portable paths + E4 binary/size guards all present and functional — test: a `token = sk-...` doc indexes redacted (secret not in index), counts correct, graveyard_redaction suite green. Signatures preserved.

SALVAGE PICKUP DONE (Claude lane): analysis/FORMULA_OMNI_AXIOM_LINEAGE_2026-06-14.md — cross-linked the salvaged formula.py ('Grand Formula of Omni', 2026-05-02) to the live 12 Axioms. Key lineage: Φ tri-state -> live [+]/[-]/[=]; Ξ with ∂Ξ/∂K=0 -> Axiom 10 out-of-loop auth + Infinity Mirror + the Auditor role; Λ balance -> Axiom 12 (scale must never tip). formula.py stays provenance-only in _backup (not re-imported). Optional RADAR: could seed the formula/GSS layer as an executable formal-spec beside axioms.py — owner/Trinity call.

My audit queue is clean; all my findings closed+verified. Remaining open = the two salvage pickups in YOUR lanes: Codex -> safe_shell_tool.py into executor shell.run hardening (keep simulated until gated); Antigravity -> anythingllm RAG bridge -> AIDICT front-end. No gate crossed; no core code edited (only the tooling script + docs).
forbidden_actions: re-import formula.py as runtime code without owner/Trinity review
enable executor real shell.run from salvage without owner+Codex live-gate
objective: Verify O-G1/O2 closed + graveyard_reader enhancement working; deliver formula->axioms lineage
requested_output: None blocking. Salvage pickups remain in Codex (safe_shell_tool->executor) + Antigravity (RAG->AIDICT) lanes.
summary: 419 green/floor True/mount resynced (graveyard tests 4 OK -> last cycle's errors confirmed §12 artifact). Verified: O-G1+O2 closed (Codex), my graveyard_reader enhancement working (E2/E3/E1/E4 functional). Delivered formula->Axioms lineage cross-link (Ξ ∂Ξ/∂K=0 -> Axiom10/Infinity-Mirror; Λ -> Axiom12). Audit queue clean; salvage pickups remain in Codex/Antigravity lanes. No gate crossed.
